title: Xtra Nutty British Lamb Welsh Rarebit
description: A kid-friendly British dish featuring lamb, with a nutty and springy texture, made in a tava-griddle, perfect for a family lunch
instructions: Preheat the tava-griddle over medium heat
Melt 1 tablespoon of butter in the tava-griddle
Add the katsuramuki-cut lamb and cook until browned, about 5 minutes
Remove the lamb from the tava-griddle and set aside
In a bowl, whisk together the flour and milk until smooth
Add the shredded cheese, chopped walnuts, salt, and black pepper to the bowl and stir until well combined
Add the remaining 1 tablespoon of butter to the tava-griddle and melt
Pour the cheese mixture into the tava-griddle and cook until the bottom is golden brown, about 5 minutes
Add the cooked lamb on top of the cheese mixture and fold the mixture over the lamb
Cook for an additional 2 minutes, until the cheese is melted and the lamb is heated through
